app.title: LBO Anonymizer
app.subtitle: Protect sensitive data in your confidential documents

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your documents

landing.badge: Your files stay on your computer
landing.description: Automatically detect and redact sensitive information in PDF documents
landing.footer: Automatic detection powered by artificial intelligence

dropzone.title: Drop your PDF here
dropzone.privacyBadge: Your data never leaves your browser

toolbar.confirmDisabledHint: {{count}}/{{total}} pages processed. Please wait until all pages are processed before confirming.

documents.title: Your Documents
documents.subtitle: View and manage your anonymized documents
documents.emptyHint: Upload and anonymize your first document to see it here
documents.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
documents.viewNotImplemented: Viewing documents is not implemented yet

sidebar.title: Detected Entities
sidebar.subtitle: Click to select, hover to preview

dialogs.removeAllInstances:
Found {{count}} instances of "{{text}}".

Do you want to remove all instances?
dialogs.foundOccurrences: Found {{count}} occurrences of "{{text}}" in the document.
dialogs.annotateAllAs: Do you want to annotate all of them as {{label}}?
dialogs.changeLabelMessage:
Found {{count}} instances of "{{text}}".

Change all to {{label}}?

privacy.title: Your data is protected
privacy.description: No data is sent to the internet. All processing happens directly on your computer.

scope.wholeDocumentDesc: Modify all {{count}} occurrences in this document
scope.allDocumentsDesc: Current document, saved documents, and future ones
scope.futureDocumentsDesc: This document, all saved documents, and future ones

editor.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

editorHelp.title: How the editor works
editorHelp.subtitle: Manual anonymization and scope options
editorHelp.selectingStep1: Click a word to set the start of the selection.
editorHelp.selectingStep2: Move the mouse to preview the range.
editorHelp.selectingStep3: Click another word to finish. Press Esc or click outside to cancel.
editorHelp.anonymizeStep1: After selecting, choose the entity type to anonymize.
editorHelp.deanonymizeStep1: Click a highlighted redaction to open actions, then choose Remove.
editorHelp.scopeStep: When asked, you can apply the change to this instance, the whole document, or the whole corpus.

logoutConfirm.title: Log out and delete local data?
logoutConfirm.message:
Logging out will delete all locally saved documents and rules from this browser (IndexedDB) and clear your current session. This cannot be undone.

Do you want to continue?
